data.title: A Closer Look at FedEx's Options Market Dynamics
Toll Brothers Q4 Beats Expectations, But Guidance Leaves Analysts Cautious
data.description: Toll Brothers' stock fell despite upbeat Q4 results in an exciting earnings season. Analysts maintain mixed ratings, with target prices up to $164.

data.title: Why Biora Therapeutics (BIOR) Stock Is Down 45%
data.description: Biora Therapeutics shares are trading lower by 45% during Tuesday's session. The company announced that it will be delisted from Nasdaq.

data.title: Why NIO Stock Is Falling
data.description: Shares of NIO are trading lower by 6.3% during Tuesday's session. Broader economic challenges in China weigh on investor sentiment.

data.title: Why Is NewAmsterdam Pharma Stock Trading Higher On Tuesday?
data.description: NewAmsterdam Pharma reports Phase 3 trial success for obicetrapib, achieving significant LDL-C reduction in ASCVD and HeFH patients on standard therapy.
